currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code. Defaults to USD.

dueDate.description: Optional due date for this bill.

incurredAt.description: When the bill was incurred. Defaults to now.

paidByUserId.description: User id of the member who paid this bill.

splits.description: Split rows. Amounts must sum exactly to totalAmount.

totalAmount.description: Total bill amount. Supports up to 2 decimal places.

amount.description: Amount this user owes for the bill. Supports up to 2 decimal places.

userId.description: User id for this split row.

assigneeUserId.description: Optional user ID to assign the chore to at creation time

description.example: Take out kitchen and bathroom trash before 9pm.

dueDate.description: Optional ISO-8601 due date for the chore

amount.description: Payment amount. Supports up to 2 decimal places.

billId.description: Optional bill id this payment is linked to.

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code. Defaults to USD.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key for safely retried payment requests.

paidAt.description: When payment was made. Defaults to now.

payeeUserId.description: User id of the member receiving payment.

payerUserId.description: User id of the member sending payment.

joinCode.description: Join code generated by group admin

assigneeUserId.description: User ID of the new assignee. Omit or set to null/undefined to unassign the chore completely.

content.description: New draft content for the group contract.
